# seca_workspace (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seca_workspace" "example" {
  name = "workspace-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `extensions` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `resource_provider` (String)
- `tenant` (String)
